title: Synchronous asset load on the main thread
symptoms: resourceloader.load blocks inside a gameplay frame
synchronous load of a scene, texture or mesh stalls the main thread
hitch on first use of an asset that was not preloaded
blocking disk or decode work during play
mechanism: An asset is loaded synchronously on the main thread (resourceloader.load or equivalent), so disk I/O and decoding block gameplay until the asset is ready.
diagnosis_hints: Check whether the spike is a loader call and whether it coincides with the first reference to an asset; see if the asset could have been preloaded or streamed.
typical_fixes: preload or warm up assets during a loading screen
load asynchronously in the background and swap in when ready
stream large assets instead of loading them whole
sources: Unreal Engine documentation — Asynchronous Asset Loading
